case.title: LOGAN v. FARMERS' DEPOSIT NAT BANK OF PITTSBURGH, PA

opinion.h1: LOGAN v. FARMERS' DEPOSIT NAT BANK OF PITTSBURGH, PA, 214 U.S. 500 (1909)
opinion.h2: FRANK J. LOGAN et al., Appellants, v. FARMERS' DEPOSIT NATIONAL BANK OF PITTSBURGH, PA. et al. No. 745.
opinion.p: Messrs. A. Leo Weil and B. M. Ambler for appellees.
Mr. Hector M. Hitchings for appellants.
Appeal dismissed for want of jurisdiction on authority of Coder v. Arts, decided April 5, 1909, 213 U.S. 223, 53 L. ed. --, 29 Sup. Ct. Rep. 436.
